metadata.description: Marketplace for the claude-flask-builder Claude Code plugin — production-grade Flask REST API scaffolding & feature building, with a self-reviewing build loop and automated build+migrate+test runner.

plugins.name: claude-flask-builder
plugins.description: Scaffolds and extends production-grade Flask REST APIs on a fixed 4-layer architecture (Controller/Service/Validation+DTO/Model). Ships 1 skill + 4 specialized agents with a double-gated review loop, automated pytest runner, and 300+ baked-in corrections vs a real reference codebase.
